info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and interacting with the ecommerce build time services, including product listing, orders, and user management.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management, including creation, update, retrieval, and deletion of product listings.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing, order status updates, and order history retrieval.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, profile updates, and user roles.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: This operation fetches the current shopping cart contents for the user identified by userId. It returns all items and their quantities within the cart, enabling clients to display the cart's status and contents.

200.description: Successful response returning the cart details

400.description: Bad Request due to invalid userId or request parameters

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: userId must be a valid string identifier.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body must include the item details such as product identifier and quantity. Returns the updated cart after addition.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

200.description: Item successfully added, returning updated cart

400.description: Invalid item data or request parameters

example.message: The provided cart item is missing required fields or contains invalid values.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the specified user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId based on their current cart or provided order details. Returns the order confirmation and details upon success.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid order placement data

example.message: Order placement request contains invalid or missing data.

details.issue: User ID does not exist or is malformed.

404.description: User or cart not found for placing order

example.message: The user or cart could not be found to place an order.

details.issue: User does not have an active cart or does not exist.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches the details and status of the order identified by orderId. Useful for tracking and reviewing order information.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid.

details.issue: Order ID must be a valid string identifier.

example.message: No order found matching the provided orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment transaction based on the payment_request details. Returns the payment processing status and relevant details upon success.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request containing payment method and transaction details

example.message: Provided payment details are incomplete or invalid.

details.issue: Payment method is required and must be supported.

402.description: Payment required error, e.g. insufficient funds or payment declined

example.message: Payment was declined by the payment processor.

details.issue: Card was declined due to insufficient funds.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Handles incoming webhook notifications from payment gateways. Accepts payment event data and processes payment status updates accordingly. Returns a payment response indicating the outcome of the webhook processing.

requestBody.description: Payload representing the payment webhook event data

400.description: Bad request due to invalid webhook payload

example.message: Webhook payload is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

402.description: Payment required - payment could not be processed

example.message: The payment associated with this webhook could not be completed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog. The request body must contain all necessary product details such as name, description, price, and inventory count. Returns the created product details upon success.

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: Noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with 20 hours battery life.

example.message: One or more product fields contain invalid or missing information.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the given name or identifier already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipment status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current shipping status and tracking details for the specified order identified by orderId. Useful for users and systems to monitor delivery progress.

404.description: Order not found or tracking data unavailable

example.message: The specified orderId does not exist or tracking information is not available.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided registration details. Includes user credentials, contact information, and preferences. Returns user profile data upon successful registration.

example.message: User registration contains invalid or incomplete information.
An account with the provided email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the item's price, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount.

price.description: Original price of the item before discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for all monetary values in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable by the user after discounts.

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Aggregate discount applied across all items.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount amount applied to the order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount in the order.

price.description: Original price of the item before discount.

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product in the order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for the order's monetary values.

items.description: Array of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount that must be paid for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for the order (e.g., Paid, Pending).

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Completed).

totalAmount.description: Total amount of all order items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid.

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format.

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order associated with this payment.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway used to process the payment.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method chosen by the customer (e.g., credit card, PayPal).

amount.description: The total amount that was processed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created, in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format.

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order associated with this payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the transaction (e.g., credit card, PayPal).

status.description: Current status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed).

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the payment gateway transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway webhook.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction associated with the webhook.

status.description: Status update from the payment gateway (e.g., completed, failed).

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the payment gateway transaction.

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for sale.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price, in ISO 4217 format.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product, from 0 to 5.

stock.description: Quantity of the product currently in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available in stock.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the product was created.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

description.example: A high-quality electronic device with multiple features.

price.description: Price of the product in specified currency.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product, from 0 to 5.

stock.description: Number of units currently in stock.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the product was last updated.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format.

lastUpdated.description: Date and time when tracking information was last updated.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the customer order.

trackingId.description: Unique tracking number associated with the shipment.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

phone.description: Phone number of the user including country code.

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions.

userType.description: Type or role of the user in the system.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the user account was created.

phone.description: Phone number of the user including country code.

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the user account was last updated.

userType.description: Type or role of the user in the system.

error.description: Short description of the error type encountered

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the cause

status.description: HTTP status code representing the client error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error occurred

path.description: Request path that caused the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request for tracing purposes

errorCode.description: Specific code identifying the type of validation or client error

details.description: List of specifics about each validation or input error

field.description: Name of the field that caused the error

issue.description: Description of the issue related to the field

error.description: Short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code for the server error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error was generated

requestId.description: Identifier for the specific request resulting in error
